body_txt: Everyone knows how tough Dracula is. He's the biggest, meanest, and more importantly, most famous vampire in modern culture. He's also conveniently in the public domain . So how do you show just how awesome your character is? Make them fight Dracula. This trope occurs whenever a previously established character or characters are pitted against Dracula. If the characters who fight Dracula have never appeared before, that is not this trope. So if Dracula were to be pitted against Captain Planet, that would be this, but if a new Dracula movie with an original cast of characters were to come out, that would not count. Similarly, works like Castlevania don't count because fighting Dracula is what they do. In some settings, this makes some sense, but in others, not so much. Note that this trope just involves the character fighting Dracula. They don't actually have to beat him (although in many cases, they find a way to do so). Related to The Worf Effect . A Sub-Trope of Cool Versus Awesome . Has a great chance of happening in a Vampire Episode .
